full_text:
Meng Kang (Gongxiu) 孟康 (公休)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Kang (孟康), styledGongxiu (公休), was born in Anping. Wrote about the notable achievements of his day. Initially people doubted his ability. Meng Kang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
